arts.ttl: Cesc Fabregas hails Celtic after signing Alex Valle on loan from Barcelona
arts.sum: As the Celtic manager looks to add another player to his squad, Como manager, Cesc Fabregas, name-checked the Parkhead club after sealing the deal to land the Barcelona full-back on loan until the end of the season. Clearly, with Celtic still close to Valle’s heart, the young Spaniard used the Parkhead club to send a message to the Como fans in a video posted on the Serie A side’s social media feed.

arts.ttl: Big mouth Bayern Munich legends name Celtic as EASIEST Champions League draw before rivals hand Rodgers blueprint for success
arts.sum: Lothar Matthaus isn't having the Scottish champions as a serious threat to the Harry Kane and Co before their knockout stage clash

arts.ttl: Rennes predicted XI v Strasbourg: Kyogo Furuhashi set for Ligue 1 debut
arts.sum: Rennes host Strasbourg this Sunday at Roazhon Park at 5:15 pm CET. The 16th-placed Ligue 1 team have just parted ways with Argentine head coach Jorge Sampaoli and appointed Habib…

arts.ttl: £4.3m star told he will never play for Celtic again after Brendan Rodgers' call
arts.sum: When Liam Scales got injured and was forced off seven minutes from time, rather than bring on Nawrocki because he was the senior centre-back, Rodgers opted for youngster, Dane Murray . He was on the bench at Villa Park and Dane Murray, late of Queens Park, three and a half years after his last Celtic game, got onto the park before Maik Nawrocki.

arts.ttl: Celtic fans sicken Graeme Souness for mocking Queen's death to the point Rangers legend refuses to even name them
arts.sum: The Ibrox icon was outraged after chants were heard by a section of the travelling fans at Villa Park

arts.ttl: Guillem Balague on what the Celtic fans did inside Villa Park in the Champions League
arts.sum: Reflecting on the game, Spanish football expert, Guillem Balague, shares what he saw the Celtic fans do inside Villa Park as both clubs played out a thrilling finale to the Champions League group stages. Guillem Balague reflects on ‘very exciting’ Aston Villa vs Celtic Champions League tie

arts.ttl: Micah Richards superbly defends Celtic after hearing what people said about Morgan Rodgers' Aston Villa hattrick
arts.sum: And whilst the Villa Park striker gets all the plaudits, former Man City star Micah Richards has defended Celtic after hearing what ‘some people say’ about the club after the Bhoys’ Champions League defeat to Aston Villa . In 21 fixtures against clubs in England’s top-flight, Celtic have lost just five and have recorded wins against the likes of Liverpool and Man United.

arts.ttl: Micah Richards gives Celtic a 'shoutout' and hails Bhoys star for being 'at his best' in Champions League
arts.sum: Micah Richards hails Celtic and Kasper Schmeichel after Champions League showing This newly revamped Champions League format has worked a treat for Celtic and Brendan Rodgers.

arts.ttl: John McGinn’s older brother shares what Aston Villa players said about Celtic's away fans
arts.sum: Aston Villa players rave about Celtic’s away support in Champions League Stephen McGinn also explained that, after speaking to his brother, he stated that the Aston Villa players were ‘raving’ about the atmosphere generated on the night by both sets of fans.

arts.ttl: Sunday's Scottish Premiership predictions including Motherwell vs. Celtic
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Scottish Premiership fixtures, including Motherwell vs. Celtic.
